title: Payment Failed but Charged
description: Customer reports payment was deducted but order was not confirmed.

title: Unable to Login
description: User cannot log into account despite using correct credentials.

title: Password Reset Not Working
description: Password reset email link is expired immediately after receiving.

title: Order Delivered to Wrong Address
description: Customer received notification of delivery but package was sent to incorrect address.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Refund requested 10 days ago but still not received.

title: App Crashes on Checkout
description: Mobile app crashes whenever user attempts to complete checkout.

title: Profile Update Error
description: User unable to update profile information due to server error.

title: Discount Code Invalid
description: Promo code shows invalid even though campaign is active.

title: Delayed Shipping
description: Order shipment delayed beyond estimated delivery date.

title: Account Suspended Unexpectedly
description: Customer account was suspended without prior notice.

title: Duplicate Order Placed
description: System placed duplicate order after single checkout attempt.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: User unable to cancel subscription from account settings.

title: Invoice Download Error
description: Invoice PDF fails to download after clicking download button.

title: Wrong Product Received
description: Customer received a different product than what was ordered.

title: Live Chat Not Responding
description: Live support chat window not loading on website.
